DappsConnect is the web3 standard to connnect blockchain wallets to Dapps.
Connect Your Wallet
With DappsConnect, you can connect your wallet with hundreds of apps, opening the doors to a new world of web3 experiences.
Are you curious about

DEFI

NFTs

DAOs

We make it easy for you to plug into web3.

The new communications protocol for web3, DappsConnect brings the ecosystem together by enabling wallets and apps to securely connect and interact.

Connect and start exploring

Any Wallet.

DappsConnect is built in to more than 75 leading wallets. Easily Integrate DappsConnect into your wallet with our Javerscript, Swift or Kotlin SDK's.

Any Dapp.

Hundreds of Dapps use DappsConnect to connect with wallets. Give users the choice to use your dapp with their favorite wallet on any device. There is easy integration with our Javascript, Swift, or Kotlin SDK's.

Any Chain.

DappsConnect is chain agnostic and built to work with any blockchain. Developers can create multichain experiences and applications. All blockchain networks are supported!!!
